abstract.text: This style can be used to modify the visual style of the
component and its nested views.

inlineContent.text: You can apply the style by using the view style modifier
to define how emojis are rendered
for most memory efficiency, since Swift allocates memory
for each emoji without releasing it right away.
defines how big an emoji view should be,
e.g. within a grid, while the
font to use. Since smaller fonts require less memory, an
can be used with a smaller font size
to draw more memory efficient emojis in lower resolution.
